creator: jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net
text:
Pharmacy (/usr/ports/devel/pharmacy) fails on "make install."  This
	is caused by the document dependency being younger than the pre-
	generated html documentation

Fix: 

# cd /usr/ports/devel/pharmacy/work/pharmacy-0.2.1a/docs/index
	# touch *
	# cd /usr/ports/devel/pharmacy
	# make install
How-To-Repeat: 	Builds fine.  But just try to install it.
